page.title: Template:Buildings and structures completed in year category header

revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Buildings and structures completed in year category header]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Buildings and structures completed in year category header]] <nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>

<includeonly><!-- -->{{Portal<!-- -->|Architecture<!-- -->|{{FindYDCportal | {{Title year}} }}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{Category explanation|buildings and structures completed in the year '''[[{{Title year}}]]'''}} {{Category series navigation|skip-gaps=yes}} {{Category see also if exists|Buildings and structures demolished in {{Title year}}}} [[Category:Buildings and structures completed in the {{Decade|{{Title year}}}}|{{Title year}}]] {{Category if exists|Category:{{Title year}} establishments}} {{#ifexpr: {{Title year}} > 999|[[Category:{{Title year}} works]]}} {{#ifexist: Category:{{Title year}} architecture<!-- -->|[[Category:{{Title year}} architecture]]<!-- -->|{{#ifexist: Category:{{DECADE|{{Title year}}}} architecture<!-- -->|[[Category:{{DECADE|{{Title year}}}} architecture]]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}} [[Category:Buildings and structures by year of completion|{{Title year}}]]<!-- --></includeonly><!-- # Note {{Automatic category TOC}} needs to be available whether or not this template page has been transcluded -->{{Automatic category TOC}}<!-- --><noinclude> {{Documentation}} [[Category:Architecture category header templates]] [[Category:Buildings and structures chronology category header templates]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Buildings_and_structures_completed_in_year_category_header here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Buildings_and_structures_completed_in_year_category_header for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> <includeonly><!-- -->{{Portal<!-- -->|Architecture<!-- -->|{{FindYDCportal | {{Title year}} }}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{Category explanation|buildings and structures completed in the year '''[[{{Title year}}]]'''}} {{Category series navigation|skip-gaps=yes}} {{Category see also if exists|Buildings and structures demolished in {{Title year}}}} {{Category if exists|Category:{{Title year}} establishments}} {{#ifexpr: {{Title year}} > 999|}} {{#ifexist: Category:{{Title year}} architecture<!-- -->|<!-- -->|{{#ifexist: Category:{{DECADE|{{Title year}}}} architecture<!-- -->|<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}} <!-- --></includeonly><!-- # Note {{Automatic category TOC}} needs to be available whether or not this template page has been transcluded -->{{Automatic category TOC}}<!-- --><noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
